meaning: vt.展出,陈列n.展览品,陈列品,展品v.展示
examples: This exhibit was kindly loaned by the artist's family.
The new exhibit will tour a dozen US cities next year.
He had kindly offered to loan us all the plants required for the exhibit.
"A lot of people say that we are haunted, " said exhibit coordinator Will Kayne, a ship officer.
She hopes the ordinary objects in the exhibit stand as testament to courage, kindness and human resiliency.
